# River City Tree Care, LLC

> Tree service and land clearing company based in Ringgold, GA

## Company Information
- Name: River City Tree Care, LLC
- Owner: Andrew Roberson
- Location: Ringgold, GA 30736
- Phone: (706) 264-6130
- Email: treeclimber1110@gmail.com
- Website: https://www.rivercitytreega.com
- Hours: Open 24 hours, 7 days a week — including holidays and emergencies
- Licensed and insured (general liability + workers' compensation)

## Services
- Tree Trimming
- Tree Removal
- Stump Grinding
- Lot Clearing
- Forestry Mulching
- Land Development
- Firewood
- Sawmill Services

## Service Area
50-mile radius from Ringgold, GA including:
- Chattanooga, TN
- Fort Oglethorpe, GA
- Dalton, GA
- Calhoun, GA
- LaFayette, GA
- Rossville, GA
- Surrounding communities in Catoosa County, Hamilton County, Whitfield County, and Walker County

## Pages
- Home: https://www.rivercitytreega.com — Overview, services, before/after gallery, FAQ
- Services: https://www.rivercitytreega.com/services — All services overview
- Tree Trimming: https://www.rivercitytreega.com/services/tree-trimming — Crown thinning, deadwood removal, clearance trimming
- Tree Removal: https://www.rivercitytreega.com/services/tree-removal — Full tree removal, 24/7 emergency response
- Stump Grinding: https://www.rivercitytreega.com/services/stump-grinding — Stump removal below grade
- Lot Clearing: https://www.rivercitytreega.com/services/lot-clearing — Residential and commercial lot clearing
- Forestry Mulching: https://www.rivercitytreega.com/services/forestry-mulching — One-pass land clearing with mulcher
- Land Development: https://www.rivercitytreega.com/services/land-development — Site prep for construction
- Firewood: https://www.rivercitytreega.com/services/firewood — Split hardwood firewood for sale
- Sawmill Services: https://www.rivercitytreega.com/services/sawmill-services — Portable on-site lumber milling
- About: https://www.rivercitytreega.com/about — Owner story, company values
- Contact: https://www.rivercitytreega.com/contact — Free estimate form, phone, email, map
